final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator channel covering new energy vehicles, consumer electronics, and lifestyle products — designed to feel visually harmonious across both Chinese and international platforms with no culturally sensitive elements.

Style/medium: clean vector-influenced illustration with the geometric warmth of mid-century product design, icon-grade clarity at small display sizes
Composition: centered square composition, single focal motif with generous breathing room, balanced visual weight for circular crop compatibility
Subject: a minimal, friendly emblem combining three motifs — a sleek electric car silhouette, a glowing screen or device, and a small everyday lifestyle object (such as a leaf or a simple household item) — unified into one cohesive mark
Scene/backdrop: flat solid background, neutral or softly tinted
Lighting/mood: the quiet confidence of a well-made object under even, shadowless light — approachable and trustworthy
Color palette: a harmonious triad of electric blue, clean white, and a warm accent (soft amber or mint green) — energetic yet calm, readable against both light and dark platform backgrounds
Materials/textures: smooth flat fills with subtle rounded edges, no gradients that feel dated, no harsh outlines
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must read clearly at 100×100 px thumbnail size; no human faces or figures; no religious, political, or national symbols; no hand gestures; no animals that carry cultural taboo risk; color choices must avoid combinations offensive in major markets (no pure white-on-white mourning association, no aggressive red-black-only palette)
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, busy backgrounds, text overlaid on the icon, culturally specific iconography that alienates non-Chinese or non-Western audiences, stuffer aesthetic
